calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Alisa Kim, Esq. appearing specially for Plaintiff. Court ordered case dismissed without prejudice at the request of Plaintiff. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2019 Continued To Sep-10-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. The Order To Show Cause is re-set to Sep-10-2019 at 10:30am in Department 610. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
